nodes.name: Sticky Note - Info
nodes.notes:
WAZUH ALERT COLLECTION WORKFLOW

This workflow receives Wazuh alerts via webhook and stores them in PostgreSQL.

Webhook URL: https://example.internal/webhook/wazuh-alert

Configuration in Wazuh:
1. Add webhook integration
2. Set URL to the webhook endpoint above
3. Set method to POST
4. Test with a sample alert

nodes.name: Sticky Note - Database
nodes.notes:
DATABASE STORAGE

Stores alerts in PostgreSQL:
- agent_name
- agent_ip
- alert_data (JSON)
- timestamp
- processed (false by default)

Make sure to configure your Postgres credentials!
